name: Brompton Lifeco Split Corp.
summary: Brompton Lifeco Split Corp. is a close-ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Brompton Funds Limited. The fund invests in the public equity markets of Canada. It invests in companies primarily engaged in the life insurance sector. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the S&P/TSX Capped Financials Index and S&P/TSX Composite Index. Brompton Lifeco Split Corp. was formed on January 19, 2007 and is domiciled in Canada.
